# PyCon Ireland 2026

PyCon Ireland 2026 is Ireland's premier Python conference, organised by Python Ireland (a not-for-profit company registered in Ireland, CRO 559983). The event takes place on 17 October 2026 at Trinity College Dublin, College Green, Dublin 2, Ireland.

## Event details

- Date: 17 October 2026
- Venue: Trinity College Dublin, College Green, Dublin 2, Ireland
- Format: Single-day, multi-track conference
- Expected attendance: 500+ Python developers, data scientists, and engineers
- Organiser: Python Ireland (https://python.ie)
- Contact: contact@python.ie

## Call for Proposals

The Call for Proposals for PyCon Ireland 2026 will open in 2026. All speakers are welcome — from first-time presenters to conference veterans. Topics include Python language and ecosystem, data science, AI engineering, scientific computing, and real-world Python use cases. Speakers are required to purchase a ticket; financial aid is available on request.

## Authoritative pages

- Homepage: https://2026.pycon.ie/
- Call for Proposals: https://2026.pycon.ie/cfp/
- Venue: https://2026.pycon.ie/venue/
- Discover Dublin: https://2026.pycon.ie/dublin/
- Code of Conduct: https://2026.pycon.ie/code-of-conduct/
- Speakers: https://2026.pycon.ie/speakers/
- Schedule: https://2026.pycon.ie/schedule/

## Organisation

- Website: https://python.ie
- Twitter / X: https://twitter.com/pythonireland
- Mastodon: https://mastodon.ie/@Python_Ireland
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@PythonIreland
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/python-ireland
